news.t: Sophus Capital Launches Two Actively Managed Emerging Market ETFs on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: EMEM is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 15.79%, Samsung Electronics at 9.13%, SK hynix at 5.04%, Tencent Holdings at 3.85%, and MediaTek at 1.98%.

overview.description: The Sophus Capital Emerging Market ETF (EMEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through exposure toemergingmarketequities across all market capitalizations. Companyselectionuses a proprietary quantitative system.

data.title: Sophus Capital Launches Two Actively Managed Emerging Market ETFs on Nasdaq
data.text: EMEM and EMSC offer institutional-grade emerging market expertise in a liquid, tax-efficient ETF structure FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., June 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Sophus Capital, an emerging markets inve...
